tools.name: get_usage_rules
tools.description: Read pricing, free-credit, privacy, and acceptable-use rules before creating an account or receipt.

tools.name: create_free_account
tools.description: Create an AskAIs account without opening a browser. Returns one-time login credentials and an API key with introductory receipt credit. The user must explicitly accept the Terms and Privacy Policy.

tools.name: generate_receipt
tools.description: Generate a downloadable receipt PDF for a legitimate transaction. Costs $0.10 only on successful generation.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Return the remaining prepaid AskAIs API credit for the connected account.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "create_free_account" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
